---
title: "Бюллетень: торговля с Индией"
subtitle: "Ежемесячный выпуск — печатная версия"
date: last-modified
format:
  pdf:
    template: ../../templates/bulletin-country-pdf.tex
    documentclass: scrartcl
    classoption:
      - DIV=12
      - numbers=noenddot
    papersize: a4
    fontsize: 9pt
    pdf-engine: xelatex
    mainfont: "Arial"
    sansfont: "Arial"
    monofont: "Courier New"
    geometry:
      - landscape
      - top=8mm
      - bottom=6mm
      - left=10mm
      - right=10mm
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    keep-tex: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| include: false
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath("."))

library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
library(stringi)
library(patchwork)
library(ggtext)

mgimo_colors <- c(
  primary   = "#003d7a",
  secondary = "#e74c3c",
  accent1   = "#27ae60",
  accent2   = "#3498db",
  accent3   = "#f39c12",
  text      = "#2c3e50",
  light_bg  = "#f8f9fa"
)

theme_pdf_base <- function() {
  theme(
    text = element_text(color = mgimo_colors[["text"]]),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    plot.margin = margin(4, 6, 2, 2)
  )
}

theme_pdf_timeseries <- function() {
  theme_classic(base_size = 9) +
    theme_pdf_base() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.key.width = unit(0.75, "cm"),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 7.5),
      legend.margin = margin(t = 1),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 7, color = mgimo_colors[["text"]]),
      axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.3, color = "grey40"),
      plot.margin = margin(2, 4, 1, 1)
    )
}

theme_pdf_groups <- function() {
  theme_minimal(base_size = 9) +
    theme_pdf_base() +
    theme(
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.2, color = "grey90"),
      legend.position = "none",
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6.6, color = mgimo_colors[["text"]]),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6.8, color = mgimo_colors[["text"]]),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 7.2, color = "grey40"),
      plot.margin = margin(2, 4, 1, 1)
    )
}

title_box_theme <- theme(
  plot.title.position = "plot",
  plot.title = ggtext::element_textbox_simple(
    size = 9.5,
    face = "bold",
    color = mgimo_colors[["primary"]],
    halign = 0.05,
    padding = margin(2, 6, 2, 6),
    margin = margin(0, 0, 2, 0),
    fill = "transparent",
    box.color = mgimo_colors[["primary"]],
    linewidth = 1,
    r = unit(3, "pt")
  )
)

trade_balance <- read_parquet("data/trade_balance_india.parquet")
df_groups <- read_parquet("data/data_4_india.parquet")
data_oil <- read_parquet("data/data_oil_export_india.parquet")

date_min <- min(trade_balance$PERIOD)
date_max <- max(trade_balance$PERIOD)
report_month <- stri_datetime_format(date_max, format = "LLLL yyyy", locale = "ru")

pl_trade_balance <-
  trade_balance %>%
  mutate(
    `Стоимость, млрд долл.` = round(STOIM / 10^9, 1),
    Показатель = case_when(
      NAPR == "ЭК" ~ "Экспорт",
      NAPR == "ИМ" ~ "Импорт",
      NAPR == "ТБ" ~ "Торговый баланс"
    )
  ) %>%
  rename(Дата = PERIOD) %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_col(
    data = ~ filter(.x, Показатель == "Торговый баланс"),
    aes(Дата, `Стоимость, млрд долл.`, fill = Показатель)
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = ~ filter(.x, Показатель != "Торговый баланс"),
    aes(Дата, `Стоимость, млрд долл.`, color = Показатель),
    linewidth = I(1)
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Экспорт" = mgimo_colors[["secondary"]], "Импорт" = mgimo_colors[["primary"]]),
    name = NULL
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Торговый баланс" = mgimo_colors[["accent1"]]),
    name = NULL
  ) +
  scale_x_date(
    breaks = seq(date_min, date_max, by = "year"),
    labels = scales::label_date("%Y")
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_pdf_timeseries() +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off")

pl_oil_export <-
  data_oil %>%
  mutate(`Экспорт, млн т` = round(NETTO, 1)) %>%
  rename(Дата = PERIOD) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Дата, y = `Экспорт, млн т`)) +
  geom_line(color = mgimo_colors[["primary"]], linewidth = I(1)) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, fill = "white", color = mgimo_colors[["primary"]], size = 1.3) +
  scale_x_date(
    breaks = seq(date_min, date_max, by = "year"),
    labels = scales::label_date("%Y")
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_pdf_timeseries() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

plot_export <- df_groups %>%
  filter(NAPR == "ЭК", TNVED4 != "2709") %>%
  mutate(
    across(c(STOIM_last12, STOIM_year_before, STOIM_diff), ~ .x * 1000),
    STOIM_diff_abs = abs(STOIM_diff),
    type = if_else(STOIM_diff > 0, "positive", "negative"),
    position_label = (STOIM_last12 + STOIM_year_before) / 2,
    label = if_else(STOIM_diff > 0, paste0("+", round(STOIM_diff, 1)), paste0(round(STOIM_diff, 1)))
  ) %>%
  arrange(-STOIM_diff_abs) %>%
  head(12) %>%
  mutate(TNVED4_string = fct_reorder(TNVED4_string, STOIM_last12)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(color = type)) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = STOIM_year_before, xend = STOIM_last12, y = TNVED4_string, yend = TNVED4_string), linewidth = 0.45) +
  geom_point(aes(x = STOIM_last12, y = TNVED4_string), fill = "white", shape = 21, size = 1.4) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(mgimo_colors[["accent1"]], mgimo_colors[["secondary"]]),
    breaks = c("positive", "negative")
  ) +
  geom_text(aes(x = position_label, y = TNVED4_string, label = label), nudge_y = 0.32, size = 2.5) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme_pdf_groups() +
  labs(y = NULL, x = "млн долл.", title = "Экспорт")

plot_import <- df_groups %>%
  filter(NAPR == "ИМ") %>%
  mutate(
    across(c(STOIM_last12, STOIM_year_before, STOIM_diff), ~ .x * 1000),
    STOIM_diff_abs = abs(STOIM_diff),
    type = if_else(STOIM_diff > 0, "positive", "negative"),
    position_label = (STOIM_last12 + STOIM_year_before) / 2,
    label = if_else(STOIM_diff > 0, paste0("+", round(STOIM_diff, 1)), paste0(round(STOIM_diff, 1)))
  ) %>%
  arrange(-STOIM_diff_abs) %>%
  head(12) %>%
  mutate(TNVED4_string = fct_reorder(TNVED4_string, STOIM_last12)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(color = type)) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = STOIM_year_before, xend = STOIM_last12, y = TNVED4_string, yend = TNVED4_string), linewidth = 0.45) +
  geom_point(aes(x = STOIM_last12, y = TNVED4_string), fill = "white", shape = 21, size = 1.4) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(mgimo_colors[["accent1"]], mgimo_colors[["secondary"]]),
    breaks = c("positive", "negative")
  ) +
  geom_text(aes(x = position_label, y = TNVED4_string, label = label), nudge_y = 0.32, size = 2.5) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme_pdf_groups() +
  labs(y = NULL, x = "млн долл.", title = "Импорт")

groups_ft <- (plot_export + title_box_theme) / (plot_import + title_box_theme) +
  plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1))

save_chart <- function(plot, name, width, height) {
  path <- file.path("pdf_figures", paste0(name, ".png"))
  dir.create(dirname(path), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  ggsave(path, plot = plot, width = width, height = height, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
  normalizePath(path, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
}

fig_balance <- save_chart(pl_trade_balance, "01-balance", 5.2, 2.65)
fig_oil <- save_chart(pl_oil_export, "02-oil", 5.2, 2.65)
fig_groups <- save_chart(groups_ft, "03-groups", 5.2, 5.6)
```

\countrypagebanner{`r report_month`}

\begin{countrypageone}
\noindent
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.485\textwidth}
\vspace{0pt}
\begin{chartpanel}{01}{Импорт, экспорт и торговый баланс, млрд \$}
\includegraphics[width=\linewidth,height=0.335\textheight,keepaspectratio]{`r fig_balance`}
\end{chartpanel}
\vspace{2pt}
\begin{chartpanel}{02}{Экспорт нефти, млн т}
\includegraphics[width=\linewidth,height=0.335\textheight,keepaspectratio]{`r fig_oil`}
\end{chartpanel}
\end{minipage}%
\hfill
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.485\textwidth}
\vspace{0pt}
\begin{chartpanel}{03}{Экспорт и импорт по категориям, млн \$}
\includegraphics[width=\linewidth,height=0.82\textheight,keepaspectratio]{`r fig_groups`}
\end{chartpanel}
\end{minipage}
\end{countrypageone}
